introSection: Afrika Expressen was a steel roller coaster previously located at Kirkuk Amusement Park in Kirkuk, Kirkuk, Iraq.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The coaster originally opened at Hassans Nöjesfält in 1985, operaring up to 2007, where it closed and was sold to Ölands Djur & Nöjespark. Its closure date at Ölands isn't known however. Its final known location was Kirkuk Amusemenet Park, where it opened somewhere around 2010. It eventually closed in 2017, with its future being unknown.

fullText:
Afrika Expressen was a steel roller coaster previously located at Kirkuk Amusement Park in Kirkuk, Kirkuk, Iraq.

The coaster originally opened at Hassans Nöjesfält in 1985, operaring up to 2007, where it closed and was sold to Ölands Djur & Nöjespark. Its closure date at Ölands isn't known however. Its final known location was Kirkuk Amusemenet Park, where it opened somewhere around 2010. It eventually closed in 2017, with its future being unknown.



Red track and white supports.
